calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial/settlement on the record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Aquilina.
Greer Smith, Esq., for Plaintiff: 50 Gold Gare Apartments, present by Gary Johnson the property manager.
Robert McConnell, Esq., for Defendant: Steve Dennis II, also present.
10:10 am. - Parties settled, Judgment pursuant to stipulation read into the record as follow:
Judgment for possession of the premises located at 50 Golden Gate Ave. #210, San Francisco.
Lease is declared forfeited. Writ may issue immediately and stay of execution until Jan. 6, 2004. Plaintiff is awarded damages as follows: $7,266.00 for back rent due and $513.45 in addition for monthly rent through Dec. 15, 2003. Any property remaining on the premises after defendant vacated is deemed abandoned and plaintiff may dispose of as it deems fit. Defendant will be deemed to have waived the right under ccp 1980. Total money judgment awarded plaintiff $7,779.45. Parties understand, agreed and signed the document in open court.
The Court deemed matter settled, trial is vacated.
